headline: Plexus' Q2 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: PLXS beats Q2 EPS estimates and posts higher revenues, fueled by strong program wins and rising demand, while boosting its fiscal 2026 growth outlook.
